text: Here, among the glass walls and the curated displays, I feel both curiosity and contemplation. The clean, modern environment invites inquiry and the pursuit of knowledge. The exhibition's focus on research and development evokes a sense of optimism about human potential and our ongoing relationship with technology. I am inspired, yet I also sense the undercurrent of questions—how do we truly coexist with what we create? There’s a quiet anticipation in the air, as if new possibilities await just beyond the next display.
